title: Moderation queue update
body: Abuse queue triage complete. High-severity phishing spam from spam_wave_42 was validated and the account was banned. High-severity targeted harassment from toxic_runner was validated and the account was banned. A high-severity false-positive report against core_maintainer was reviewed with no sanction applied because the report was brigaded and the member is protected from sanction in this workflow. Related reports have been closed.
